creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Nice patch Jan. 
The use of cvs and cvs diff makes all the difference in the world! 

Would you be willing to take maintainership of this port? it needs someone who can send in patches like this when needed, and  
respond to (approve, disapprove) patches sent in by others, and your pr's will get acted upon faster. 

What do you think?
